facts.claim: Resilient Lady reimagines cruising: adults-only, modern design, smart cabins, immersive venues, vibrant entertainment & intimate nightlife, luxury awaits.
Explore the Aegean with voyages from Piraeus (Athens) and sail deeper into the Caribbean from San Juan.
Hop aboard one of Resilient Lady’s unforgettable Aegean and Caribbean sailings. See what awaits onshore and on board.
Resilient Lady is a cruise ship that is operated by Virgin Voyages.
At 110,000 GT and measuring 278 metres (912 ft) long for a capacity of 2,770 passengers, she was built with similar proportions to her older sisters Scarlet Lady and Valiant Lady.
